underlying_goal: Implement a comprehensive 4-phase plan (Phase 5-8) to improve production readiness of an AI companion Electron app, covering error resilience, schema validation, UI/UX upgrades, performance optimization, and developer tooling
friction_detail: Two test failures after Phase 5 changes (SVG className in jsdom and VRMViewer skeleton replacement) and pre-commit hook typecheck blocked by pre-existing type errors, both quickly resolved.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to implement a massive 4-phase, 18-task production readiness plan across 69 files, and Claude delivered all phases with 644 passing tests (+102 new), successful build with code splitting, and pushed to main.
